message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam lifelineStrategy solid
skinparam noteStyle handwritten
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam participantPadding 20
skinparam boxPadding 10
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBackgroundColor White
  LifeLineBorderColor Black
  ActivationBackgroundColor #F0F0F0
  ActivationBorderColor Black
  ArrowColor Black
  ArrowThickness 1
}

title Add Member to Group Sequence Diagram

participant "IntegrationTest" as IT
participant "Spring Application" as SA
participant "De /nSerializer" as DS
participant "info:AddMember\nRequestInfoDTO" as InfoDTO
participant "ctrl:AddMember\nToGroupController" as Ctrl
participant "AddMember\nRequestAssembler" as ReqAsm
participant "requestDTO:\nAddMemberRequestDTO" as ReqDTO
participant "srv:AddMember\nToGroupService" as Srv
participant "AddMemberResponse\nDTOAssembler" as RespAsm
participant "groupRespDTO:\nGroupResponseDTO" as RespDTO

IT -> SA: POST\n1 /groups/"Family"/\nmembers/"ana@gmail.com"
activate SA
SA -> DS: 1.1 deserialize("groupDesc":"Family",\n"personEmail":"ana@gmail.com")
activate DS
DS -> InfoDTO: 1.1.1 create (groupDesc,\npersonEmail)
activate InfoDTO
DS --> SA: 
deactivate DS
SA -> Ctrl: 1.2 addMember(info)
activate Ctrl
Ctrl -> ReqAsm: addMemberMapToDTO\n1.2.1 (info.getGroupDescription(),\ninfo.getPersonEmail())
activate ReqAsm
ReqAsm -> ReqDTO: 1.2.1.1 create
activate ReqDTO
ReqAsm --> Ctrl: 
deactivate ReqAsm
Ctrl -> Srv: 1.2.2 addMemeber(requestDTO)
activate Srv
Srv --> Ctrl: 1.2.3 groupDTO
deactivate Srv
Ctrl -> RespAsm: 1.2.4 mapToGroupResponseDTO(GroupDTO)
activate RespAsm
RespAsm -> RespDTO: 1.2.4.1 create
activate RespDTO
RespAsm --> Ctrl: 
deactivate RespAsm
Ctrl --> SA: 1.2.5 groupRespDTO
deactivate Ctrl
SA --> IT: 1.2.6 ResponseEntity(groupRespDTO,\nHttpStatus.OK)
SA -> DS: 1.3 serialize(ResponseEntity(groupRespDTO,\nHttpStatus.OK))
activate DS
DS --> SA: 
deactivate DS
SA --> IT: 1.4 HttpResponse
deactivate SA
IT --> IT: 1.5 HttpResponse

note right of Srv
Continues through\nnext Diagram
end note

@enduml
